title: Pulling User ID numbers for Zapier integration
excerpt:
Is there a way to pull a list of Monday.com user ID numbers in a bulk format like a .CSV or .XLS sheet? I can find names of team members in Monday.com but not numbers.

posts.author: KatL (Katherine Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to pull a list of Monday.com user ID numbers in a bulk format like a .CSV or .XLS sheet? I can find names of team members in Monday.com but not numbers.

I’m building out a Zapier integration that automatically adds new Monday.com items whenever a new row is added in a Google Sheet. These Google sheet rows have columns with the names of team members who are assigned to the campaign details listed on the row. I’m building a lookup table to match the names on the Google Sheet with Monday.com user accounts, so I need the user ID numbers.

mondayIDs759×624 49.2 KB

thank you!
Katherine

posts.author: Ben.H (Ben Hsiung)
posts.cookedHtml:
Double Bump.

The temporary workaround I have used is to make a new Zap and use a Trigger Event of “New User.” Testing will display a user’s Monday ID. Definitely not ideal.
